strengths: Meets 15+ year experience requirement with diverse technical depth across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering
Demonstrated entrepreneurial execution as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-platform with real-world adoption by Green Map
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) shows emerging awareness of AI-adjacent emerging technologies
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, machine learning products, or strategic AI thinking—critical gap for an AI Strategy-focused Principal role
Lacks advanced degree in AI-related field and no evidence of Director-level strategic leadership, thought leadership, or industry influence
Limited cloud architecture depth; AWS CDK mentioned but no evidence of strategic cloud platform thinking, cloud-native design, or customer advisory work

key_factors.factor: AI/ML expertise and demonstrated AI products
Strategic leadership and thought leadership narrative
Technical breadth and proven execution track record

response.justification: Bogdan is a technically accomplished engineer with 15+ years of software experience and founder-level entrepreneurial credentials that meet base requirements. However, the role explicitly centers on AI strategy and requires recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated AI products—areas entirely absent from his resume. While his recent re:cinq work involves AI infrastructure, this appears preliminary and underdeveloped. The absence of AI/ML background, advanced degree in AI-related field, and no evidence of shipping AI-powered products represents a fundamental misalignment with the role's core focus on identifying strategic AI differentiation opportunities and advising on AI adoption.
